title: Infosys Receives Tax Penalty Demand of INR 40,72,525
detailed_summary: Infosys disclosed receipt of communication for collection of a penalty from the Deputy Commissioner of Commercial Taxes. The total penalty is INR 40,72,525/- and relates to an alleged mismatch in credit notes declared in GSTR-1 versus GSTR-9 for F.Y. 2018-19. Infosys stated there is no material impact on its financials, operations, or other activities.

key_facts.fact: Infosys received communication for collection of a total penalty of INR 40,72,525/- from the Deputy Commissioner of Commercial Taxes.
The demand was alleged under declaration of turnover due to mis-match in credit notes declared in GSTR-1 vs GSTR-9 for the F.Y. 2018-19.
Infosys stated that there is no material impact on financials, operations or other activities of the Company.

litigation_or_regulatory_matters.description: Orders passed/ action taken for alleged under declaration of turnover due to mis-match in credit notes declared in GSTR-1 vs GSTR-9 for the F.Y. 2018-19.

important_text_spans.reason: Supports the amount of the penalty disclosed by Infosys.

important_text_spans.text: None, there is no material impact on financials, operations or other activities of the Company.
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the company’s stated impact assessment.

processing_notes: Marked non-material because the disclosed penalty is small relative to Infosys and the company explicitly stated there is no material impact on financials, operations, or other activities.
